name: Private Cloud Manager
description: Registers OpenClaw agent tools for VMware VM inventory, jobs, and SSH actions backed by the local private-cloud-manager API.

baseUrl.description: Base URL for the private-cloud-manager backend API.

token.description: Bearer token used to authenticate to the backend API. Can also be provided with the PCM_TOKEN environment variable.

timeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for backend API requests in milliseconds.
